Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: execute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:

Constraints:
- Keep the entire JSON compact.
- decision_notes: 3-8 words.
- response: Exactly two lines using \n:

}
